#!/bin/bash
# CDB APEX v37.0 — Proactive Preparation and Hardening Against Destructive Atta
iptables -A INPUT -s 1.3.6.1 -j DROP
iptables -A OUTPUT -d 1.3.6.1 -j DROP
iptables -A INPUT -s 2.5.29.37 -j DROP
iptables -A OUTPUT -d 2.5.29.37 -j DROP
iptables -A INPUT -s 5.2.3.4 -j DROP
iptables -A OUTPUT -d 5.2.3.4 -j DROP
iptables -A INPUT -s 5.5.7.3 -j DROP
iptables -A OUTPUT -d 5.5.7.3 -j DROP
